Actually, let me look at the dark gray positions:

- After 2 LEFTs: cols 21-35... wait, the boundary showed cols 15-29 after 2 LEFTs. Let me re-check.

The dark gray is close to the player. If I do 1 more LEFT, the dark gray will move to cols 24-38, overlapping with the player at cols 36-38.
